lines.en_lit: North of Jerusalem, and outside of three camps. Rabbi Yosei says: They are burned in the place of the ashes.

Rava said: Who is tanna who disagrees with Rabbi Yosei It is Rabbi Eliezer ben Ya’akov, as it was taught “Where the ashes are poured out [shefekh hadeshen] shall it be burned” that there shall be ash there Rabbi Eliezer ben Ya’akov says: that its place should be slanted [meshupakh]
Abaye said to him: perhaps they disagree about whether the place must be slanted.

The Sages taught: “And he who burns garments who burns are rendered impure, but not who kindles the fire, and not who arranges the pile And who is the one who burns? It is the one who assists at the time of burning.

might garments would be rendered impure even become ash. the verse states: Them, they render garments impure, but they do not render garments impure once they become ash. Rabbi Elazar, son of Rabbi Shimon, says: The bull causes ritual impurity the flesh is burned it no longer renders garments impure.
What is between the There is between them when he turned it into a charred

MISHNA: They said to the High Priest: The goat has reached the wilderness. And how did they know that the goat reached the wilderness? They would build platforms [dirkaot] and wave scarves [sudarin] And they knew that the goat reached the wilderness.

Rabbi Yehuda said: Didn’t they have a reliable indicator? From Jerusalem to Beit Ḥiddudo, three mil. walked a mil and returned a mil, and waited equivalent a mil, they knew that the goat reached the wilderness.

Rabbi Yishmael says: Didn’t they have a different indicator? There was a strip of crimson tied to the entrance to the Sanctuary, and when goat reached the wilderness the strip would turn white, as it is stated: “Though your sins be as scarlet, they will become white as snow”
GEMARA: Abaye said: Learn from this Beit Ḥiddudo is located in the wilderness, and this teach us that Rabbi Yehuda holds that once the goat has reached the wilderness, its mitzva is complete
MISHNA: The High Priest came to read If he wished to read in fine linen garments, he read and if not he read in a white robe of his own,

The synagogue attendant takes a Torah scroll and gives it to the head of the synagogue and the head of the synagogue gives it to the deputy and the Deputy gives it to the High Priest, and the High Priest stands and receives And he reads “After the death” and “But on the tenth” and furls the Torah scroll and places it on his bosom and says: More than what I have read before you is written here. “And on the tenth,” from the book of Numbers he reads by heart.

And he recites after eight blessings: Concerning the Torah: and concerning the service: and concerning thanksgiving: and concerning pardon of iniquity: and concerning the Temple in and of itself, and concerning the Jewish People in and of itself, and concerning Jerusalem in and of itself, and concerning the priests in and of themselves, and concerning the rest of the prayer,

One who sees the High Priest reading does not see the bull and goat that are burned; and one who sees the bull and goat that are burned does not see the High Priest reading And not due to that one is not permitted but because there was a distant path and performance of both of them simultaneously.
GEMARA: From that it is taught in a white robe of his own, by inference reading is not a service,

But teaches: If he wished to read in fine linen garments, he read Learn from this it is permitted to derive benefit from priestly vestments, perhaps reading is different, it is for the purpose of service;
As the dilemma was raised before us: Is it permitted to derive benefit from priestly vestments, or is it not permitted to derive benefit from priestly vestments?

Come hear would not sleep in sacred vestments It is sleep which is not but they may eat perhaps eating is different, it is for the purpose of service. As it was taught “And they shall eat those things with which atonement was made” teaches that the priests eat and the owners achieve atonement.
it is sleep which is not but they may walk by right walking is also not
